summary: End-to-end UI testing of Phase 1 Inventory Management module (Item Master, Vendor Master, Vendor-Item Pricing). 19/19 critical UI flows passed including all validations (duplicate item_code case-insensitive, GSTIN format, customer-specific link requirement, price overlap). Backend already verified by main agent — not re-tested per the request.

issues: Radix DialogContent emits a11y warnings: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}'. Add <DialogDescription> to the Item Form dialog and Vendor delete/form dialogs (Price dialog already has one). Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional polish) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to Item form, Vendor form and the delete-confirm dialogs to silence Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: InventoryItemUpdate model intentionally omits opening_stock/current_stock — good (current stock is shown read-only in edit mode and not in payload).
Item code uniqueness check uses regex with re.escape on user input — safe and case-insensitive as designed.
Price overlap helper _ranges_overlap correctly treats None price_active_to as open-ended (date.max).
Customer-specific guard enforced on both create_item and update_item (when toggling on without a customer_id) — covered.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and Bearer token from localStorage — consistent with conventions.

Minor: Inventory.js loads vendors only once on mount; if a user creates a vendor in another tab, they need to refresh the Item Master before it appears in the price dialog vendor select. Acceptable for Phase 1.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Item_*, TEST_CS_*, TEST_Vendor_* and corresponding vendor-item prices during the run; all deleted via UI Delete flows + a final mongo cleanup pass. DB is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 of Inventory Management (Item Master, Vendor Master, Vendor-Item time-bounded pricing) is fully functional end-to-end. UI testIDs in /app/frontend/src/pages/Inventory.js and Vendors.js match the spec. The customer linker (item-customer-search) is a typeahead over GET /api/leads and GET /api/accounts; lead/account data exists in the tenant (Drive Folder Test Lead was used). For price 'Active' badge testing, current date is June 2026 — use 2026-06-01..2026-06-30 for active and 2026-07-01..2026-12-31 for non-overlapping future. Stock entries / POs / GRN / dashboard / reports are explicitly Phase 2+ — do not test.
